name: Slugger 100 Percent Completion Tasks
canonical_path: slugger build -> full-sdlc-v2 -> draft release candidate

tasks.title: Freeze the canonical architecture and delete alternate runtime paths
Make managed prompts the only runtime prompt source
Create one provider and service resolution path
Complete planning, architecture, ADR, and design stages
Implement one real Codex coding and review adapter
Make AppManifest the only generated application output
Use one durable artifact, lineage, and workflow persistence system
Secure and connect the single materialization and build path
Fix approvals and make one durable approval path
Create one readiness and release-gate engine
Connect one GitHub delivery path and complete CI/package distribution
Delete dead code, duplicate tests, cache artifacts, and unsupported templates
Prove the single path end to end and certify 100% completion
